headline: Should DexCom’s Margin Gains and Expanded Coverage Require Action From DexCom (DXCM) Investors?
summary: DexCom, Inc. reported past first-quarter 2026 results with revenue of US$1,191.9 million, net income of US$199.5 million, and diluted EPS of US$0.51, while reaffirming full-year revenue guidance of US$5.16 billion to US$5.25 billion. The company coupled this financial strength with broader access for its continuous glucose monitoring systems, including new coverage for millions of type 2 non-insulin users and higher profitability guidance. Next, we’ll examine how DexCom’s stronger margins...
